note: This is a SAMPLE agreement — terms may vary by state and transaction.

grant_and_term.grant: Non-exclusive license to use the System in operation of a hotel at a specified location under the Graduate brand (FA §2.1)
grant_and_term.reserved_rights: Franchisor reserves all rights not specifically granted including right to own/operate/franchise any Other Business anywhere (FA §2.2)

fee_obligations.monthly_program_fee: 4% of GRR, may increase up to +1% over term (FA §8.1)
fee_obligations.payment_method: Wire transfer or electronic funds transfer required; franchisee bears all costs (FA §8.2)
fee_obligations.set_off: Franchisor may reduce any payment or credit by amounts owed to franchisor or affiliates (FA §8.7)
fee_obligations.interest_on_overdue: 18% per annum or maximum lawful rate, whichever is lower (FA §16.15)

construction_requirements.plan_approval_required: Yes — cannot start construction until franchisor approves plans (FA §6.1)
construction_requirements.ada_certification_required: Yes — architect or certified professional must certify ADA compliance (FA §6.1)
construction_requirements.opening_authorization: Must receive written authorization before opening (FA §6.4)

training_obligations.required: GM and key personnel must complete required training programs (FA §4.1, §5.1.5)
training_obligations.franchisee_bears_all_costs: Training fees, travel, lodging, food, expenses

operational_obligations.comply_with_standards: Must comply with Manual and all Standards at all times (FA §5.1)
operational_obligations.24_hour_operation: Must operate 24 hours/day every day unless permitted otherwise (FA §5.1)
operational_obligations.reservation_service: Must use and participate in Reservation Service (FA §4.2, §5.1)
operational_obligations.hilton_honors: Must participate in all guest frequency programs (FA §5.1)
operational_obligations.computer_systems: Must use required business computer systems (OnQ/HPMS) (FA §5.1.3, §5.1.6)
operational_obligations.insurance: Must maintain minimum levels specified in Manual (FA §5.1.22)
operational_obligations.audit_rights: Franchisor has right to audit books and records (FA §10.3)
operational_obligations.management_company: Must operate via approved Management Company or with franchisor approval (FA §7.0)

curable_defaults: Failure to commence/complete hotel work (10-day cure) (FA §13.1.2)
Failure to comply with any curable provision (30-day cure) (FA §13.1.4)
non_curable_defaults: Same material breach recurring within 24 months (FA §13.2.1)
termination_triggers.interim_remedies: Suspension from Reservation Service, directory removal, reservation diversion, software disabling, fee revocation (FA §13.3)

liquidated_damages.post_opening_before_2nd_anniversary: Greater of (Avg Monthly Royalty × 60) or ($11,200 × rooms) (FA §13.4)
liquidated_damages.actual_damages_special_circumstances: In certain circumstances franchisor may elect actual damages instead (FA §13.5)

transfer_restrictions.permitted_transfers_no_consent: Publicly traded equity, private <50% no control change, institutional fund (FA §12.2.1.1)
transfer_restrictions.permitted_transfers_with_consent: Affiliates, family, trusts, death, private >50% change — 60 days notice, $5,500 fee (FA §12.2.1.2)
transfer_restrictions.change_of_ownership: All other transfers — 60 days notice, $150,000 fee, new FA, PIP (FA §12.2.2)

noncompete.during_term: May not own/be licensor/franchisor of competing brand. May own minority interest under certain conditions. May be franchisee or non-exclusive manager of competitor. (FA §5.1.29)
noncompete.competitor_use_of_marks: Must not allow any Competitor to use franchisee's marks without franchisor approval (FA §5.1.29)

guaranty.scope: Each required guarantor (may include spouse) assumes and agrees to discharge certain obligations under the Franchise Agreement (Exhibit E)
guaranty.third_party_guaranty: May be required as condition for lender comfort letter or after default notice

dispute_resolution.governing_law: New York law without conflicts of law principles (FA §16.2.1)
dispute_resolution.venue: U.S. District Court, Eastern District of Virginia (Alexandria); or state court in Fairfax County, VA; or New York, NY. Franchisor may sue at hotel location. (FA §16.2.2)
dispute_resolution.arbitration: None except Puerto Rico (Puerto Rico Addendum §16.2.2)
dispute_resolution.attorneys_fees: Prevailing party entitled to recover reasonable fees, costs, expenses (FA §16.14)

indemnification.scope: Franchisee must defend, indemnify, and hold harmless franchisor, Hilton Worldwide, and their subsidiaries, affiliates, officers, directors, employees, agents, successors and assigns against any claim, demand, tax, penalty, or investigation arising from claimed occurrence at hotel (FA §14)

force_majeure.definition: Events beyond reasonable control — defined in FA §1.0
force_majeure.hotel_closure: If failure to operate due to Force Majeure, non-curable default does not apply provided franchisee took reasonable steps to minimize impact (FA §13.2.6)
force_majeure.casualty_rebuild: Must reopen within 18 months after closing (FA §11.2)

distinctive_clauses.confidentiality_of_negotiated_terms: Franchisee must not disclose negotiated terms to any person without consent except as required by law, in legal proceedings, or to officers/directors/managers/lenders for hotel operations. Violation is a default. (FA §16.18)
distinctive_clauses.general_release: Franchisor may condition amendment/waiver on franchisee executing estoppel and general release of claims (FA §16.8)
distinctive_clauses.economic_conditions_not_defense: Economic conditions are not a defense to obligations under the agreement (FA §16.10)
distinctive_clauses.exemption_acknowledgment: Franchisee acknowledges franchise sale exceeds $1,469,600 exemption threshold or has 5+ years business experience and $7,348,000+ net worth (FA §18.0)
distinctive_clauses.food_beverage_consultant_approval: Must use franchisor-approved F&B consultant — distinctive to Graduate brand (Item 8)
distinctive_clauses.no_post_term_noncompete: Unusual for major hotel franchise — no post-term competitive restriction
